channel.title: Example on Arshad Azad
channel.description: Recent content in Example on Arshad Azad

item.title: Using OpenRefine
item.description: Problem(s) at hand The survey data I was cleaning has responses which were not systematic and required interpretation. It contained spelling mistakes, has non-meaningful characters and data was simply not tidy. Resources The Carpentries have provided an amazing introduction to OpenRefine install and use OpenRefine. This manual could be helpful when one delves deeper into the use. Sometimes, stackoverflow could also be useful.
